title: Tunisian Beef Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Tunisia, made with tender beef and spices. Serve over couscous for a traditional meal.

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 1 1/2 hours.
Stir in couscous and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
